zh.lifeSummary: 當William Edward Barlow於1350年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特霍爾頓--德洛可時，他的父親Robert Barlow32歲，母親Agnes Entwhistle20歲。他於1374年與Margery Joyce Linney在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特霍爾頓--德洛可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在英國藍卡爾巴洛 白 曼徹斯特享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Barlow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called Barlow, especially those in Lancashire and Yorkshire. The former is named with Old English bere ‘barley’ + hlāw ‘hill’; the latter probably has as its first element the derived adjective beren or the compound bere-ærn ‘barn’. There is also a place of this name in Derbyshire, named with Old English bār ‘boar’ or bere ‘barley’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, and one in Shropshire, which is from bere ‘barley’ + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Edward Barlow was born in 1350, in Chorlton-on-Medlock, Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Barlow, was 32 and his mother, Agnes Entwhistle, was 20. He married Margery Joyce Linney in 1374, in Chorlton-on-Medlock, Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1400, in Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, England, at the age of 50.

Il a épousé Margery Joyce Linney en 1374, à Chorlton-on-Medlock, Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1400, à Barlow by Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: William Edward Barlow(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터 초를토--메들록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Barlow(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Entwhistle(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터 초를토--메들록에서 Margery Joyce Linney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 영국 랭카실르 발로 비 먼체스터에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Joyce Linney в 1374 г. в местности чаурлтон-он-медлокк, манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.
